constraints.preserve_orphan_history: Do NOT delete or rewrite prior orphan commits; use --force push to ADD a new commit on top of 9d9958b5
constraints.no_corpus_files: Do NOT include the 3.2 GB curated corpus (deferred to L7-009+ heavy-runner subagent per ADR-023)
constraints.idempotent: Re-running the push recipe should be a no-op on already-pushed content
constraints.commit_to_both_branches: Commit L7-008 worklog to BOTH registry main (local) AND orphan branch (remote push)
constraints.scripts_compatible_with_existing_worktre: All scripts work in the existing curation-data worktree (canonical location for prune/mark/render/propagate)
constraints.no_manual_edits_to__bindings_json: Preserve provenance; mark with `archived: true` flag instead of dropping (per L7-007 decision)

objective: Author canonical STATUS.md covering L7-001 → L7-008 phase recap with deltas, current remote SHAs for orphan + main + T23, per-phase key outputs (45,091 records, 107 bound repos, 8 stubs, 3 extraction targets, 12 archived markers), 21 successful subagent dispatches across 8 phases, outstanding human-judgment queue, weekly refresh cadence status. Push STATUS.md + L7-007 worklog + L7-007 script changes to remote orphan via proven orphan-bundle recipe.

Worklog documenting the STATUS.md + orphan-push cycle

deliverables.modifications: Added --show-archived flag (+47 lines). Default: SKIP archived. With flag: render with [ARCHIVED] prefix + status: archived frontmatter.
Added --show-archived flag (+51 lines). Default: SKIP archived. With flag: propagate to monorepo. PROPAGATION_ARCHIVED_NOTICE banner.

Network: stable for push (orphan is ~87 KB)

outstanding_human_judgment_queue: 1. User review of the 12 archived: true flags (especially McpKit — deferred in L7-006, re-included in L7-007)
2. Decide if pattern `phenotype-vessel` should also be archived (matches ADR-019 intent but not the literal `phenoVessel-*` wildcard)
3. Decide if `phenotype-voxel`, `phenotype-terrain`, `phenotype-water`, `phenotype-postfx` should also be archived (retired per L5-109..114, but not in L7-007 task list)
4. Schedule L7-009 for next archived-flag refresh (weekly cadence per ADR-024 / ADR-041)
5. Verify first weekly-refresh launchd plist fires on 2026-06-22 09:00 PDT
6. Decide on STATUS.md deprecation of prior STATUS-REPORT.md + STATUS-L7-004-VERIFICATION.md (current decision: deprecated, kept for traceability)
open_questions: Q1: Should the L7-007 archived-flag propagation be re-run after orphan-push to verify byte-identical state? — Yes, scheduled for L7-009 first run.

Q2: Should `phenotype-registry-curation-data` L7-006 worklog be promoted to orphan branch (currently only in curation-data, not on orphan)? — Yes, included in this turn's orphan-push as part of L7-007 worklog bundle.
Q3: Should the T23 worktree (local only) be promoted to a remote branch? — No, per ADR-023 device-fit policy; T23 is ephemeral.
Q4: Should the 3.2 GB curated corpus push be re-attempted via a heavy-runner subagent? — Yes, deferred to L7-009+ (post weekly cadence established).
Q5: Should the orphan branch be force-pushed or recreated (i.e., `--orphan` flag + reset)? — Force-push (preserves commit history graph; the orphan branch IS the audit trail).

Update STATUS.md with final orphan SHA after push completes (this turn, post-verification)
Schedule L7-009 weekly refresh (post this turn, weekly cadence)
Promote L7-007 archived-flag propagation as a recurring weekly task in scripts/l7-weekly-refresh.sh
Authorize launchd plist for weekly refresh (first run 2026-06-22 09:00 PDT)
